I'm rendering static populated UI for WatchlistScreen without any API calls. I'm implementing static mock data for WatchlistScreen to match the design spec exactly. I'm rendering only the static layout from watchlist.html on WatchlistScreen without API integration. 

I'm adding placeholder cards with fallback styling for missing poster URLs and implementing local state for filter chips in WatchlistScreenHeader. I'm implementing filter chip styling with active/idle states and updating header text to match HTML casing.
